name: Kangjin Kim, DPH
title: Assistant Professor
department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
bio: Kangjin Kim, DPH, is an assistant professor in the Department of Applied Statistics at Gachon University. His research develops rigorous and reproducible statistical approaches for high-dimensional biomedical data, with applications to statistical genetics, multi-omics, survival and prediction modeling, respiratory disease, and precision medicine. Before joining Gachon University, he completed postdoctoral research training at Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women’s Hospital.

background.label: Statistical training
background.value: BS and MS in Statistics; DPH in Biostatistics
